caseStudy.title: From Release to Reach: 450% ROI Growth for Ekam Bawa
caseStudy.summary: This comprehensive case study details how Adomantra Digital orchestrated a highly successful global marketing campaign for Punjabi artist Ekam Bawa, delivering an exceptional 450% Return on Investment (ROI). Facing intense industry competition and audience fragmentation across short-form video and streaming apps, the agency bypassed traditional mass marketing in favor of a data-driven, three-phased digital blueprint. They maximized initial engagement by pre-seeding the track's most infectious 15-second audio hook onto platforms like Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts to spark early algorithmic traction. Paid media distribution was strictly hyper-targeted to dense Punjabi diaspora zones worldwide, including specific regions across India, Canada, the UK, and the US, rather than targeting countries broadly. This precision-driven approach efficiently guided high-intent listeners directly to streaming platforms, triggering massive spikes in user saves and track completion rates. Consequently, these metrics signaled streaming algorithms to automatically push the release onto major editorial playlists like Spotify's Punjabi 101. The campaign ultimately yielded over 15 million YouTube views, 3.5 million Spotify streams, and more than 120,000 unique user-generated Reels. By optimizing every stage of the digital funnel, Adomantra proved that hyper-localized targeting and short-form audio integration can scale an artist's global reach at a remarkably low cost per stream.
caseStudy.projectobjective:
The Project

A strategic digital transformation and marketing blueprint orchestrated by Adomantra Digital for Punjabi artist Ekam Bawa.

The Objective

To maximize global and regional listener engagement, build cross-platform velocity, and engineer long-term audience retention in a highly competitive market.

The Ultimate Result

A 450% Return on Investment (ROI) growth, transforming a localized music launch into a high-yielding, globally recognized streaming asset.
caseStudy.leadParagraph:
THE CORE CHALLENGE: BREAKING THROUGH THE NOISE

The Punjabi music industry is one of the fastest-growing yet most saturated verticals in the entertainment sector.

  • The Fragmentation Barrier: Audio consumers are split across Reels, Shorts, Spotify, Apple Music, and more.
  • The Cost-Per-Acquisition Crisis: Broad ads generate vanity metrics instead of long-term streaming revenue.

THE STRATEGIC BLUEPRINT

  • Phase 1: Pre-Release Hook Optimization — 15-second audio hooks seeded on short-form platforms.
  • Phase 2: Diaspora-Targeted Media Buying — Focused geo-targeting (Punjab, Delhi-NCR, Canada, UK).
  • Phase 3: Algorithmic Playlist Escalation — Triggering Spotify & Apple Music playlist boosts via engagement signals.

THE METRICS OF SUCCESS

PlatformImpactGrowth
YouTube Network15M+ Total Views3.2x Organic View Velocity
Spotify3.5M+ Streams280% Monthly Listener Surge
Social Virality120K+ Reel CreationsHigh UGC Growth
Financial Outcome450% ROI GrowthRecord-low Cost Per Stream

The Definitive Takeaway

Hyper-local targeting + short-form audio funnels can scale artists globally while delivering strong financial returns without brute-force ad spending.

comprehensiveSummary.title: Comprehensive Campaign Summary
comprehensiveSummary.heading: Digital Breakthrough Strategy for Ekam Bawa
comprehensiveSummary.paragraph: Adomantra engineered a comprehensive, data-driven audio branding and multi-channel campaign to scale Ekam Bawa's streaming metrics and artist profile footprint. By transitioning from general display branding to hyper-targeted cohort delivery and audio ads, we turned passive listeners into active subscribers and dedicated streams.
comprehensiveSummary.imageQuery: punjabi singer performing on stage microphone concert light

categories.name: Views
categories.checked: Content is getting good visibility and impressions, indicating the algorithm is pushing videos to a wider audience.
categories.crossed: CTR: 4.0% (Target: 8–12%) - Thumbnails and titles are not compelling enough to convert impressions into clicks, limiting overall performance.

categories.name: Unique Viewers
categories.checked: A large portion of new users are finding the content, showing strong potential for audience growth.
categories.crossed: Sub Conversion: 0.05% - Viewers are not subscribing, indicating weak CTAs, low content loyalty, or lack of strong branding.

categories.name: Critical Issues & Retention
categories.checked: Avg Duration: 1:54 (Target: 2:30+) - Audience retention is average; early drop-offs suggest the need for stronger hooks and better engagement throughout the video.
categories.crossed: Revenue: $80 → Weak monetization - Despite high views, earnings are low, indicating poor RPM, weak audience targeting, or lack of monetization strategies.

ourApproachCircles.title: Our Implementation Approach
ourApproachCircles.subtitle: An overview of our dynamic 5-pillar deployment strategy

tasks.task: Consolidate official artist assets across DSPs
Design custom CTR thumbnails & titles for new launch
Pre-save launch engine setup on Spotify
Audience cohort mapping based on similar artists
Implement mid-roll annotation cards & direct CTAs
A/B testing on video description keywords
Weekly progress review against performance targets

clientOverview.title: Client Overview & Pre-Campaign Baseline
clientOverview.description: Ekam Bawa is a highly talented Punjabi singer, songwriter, and composer. Despite releasing popular tracks, his digital footprint was fragmented across multiple unofficial channels, and release campaigns lacked data-driven targeting strategies.

dataBox1.title: The Initial Digital Challenges
items: Fragmented Audience: Listeners were scattered, with low subscription retention on official YouTube and Spotify profiles.
Inefficient Release Ad Spend: High cost-per-view during new track launches due to broad targeting instead of cohort-based optimization.
Lack of Direct Engagement: Weak cross-channel fan attribution, meaning streams didn't translate into high social media following.

challenges.title: The Core Marketing Challenges
challenges.description: Our baseline assessment identified three primary challenges limiting Ekam Bawa's digital footprint and organic streaming growth:

cards.title: High Viewership, Low Retention
cards.body: Early releases achieved quick temporary views through generalized ads, but failed to build a loyal listener subscriber base on Spotify and YouTube.

cards.title: Saturated Punjabi Music Market
cards.body: Standing out amidst high-budget Punjabi music label releases required a highly localized, high-impact creative hook combined with surgical digital targeting.

cards.title: Fragmented Fan Journey
cards.body: Fans listening on YouTube were not converting into Spotify followers or Instagram subscribers, resulting in zero cross-platform value accumulation.

strategy.title: The Strategic Road Map & Execution
strategy.description: To overcome these hurdles, we executed a 3-phase strategic framework focusing on Release Architecture, Audio Ad targeting, and Omni-channel Fan Funnels.

timeline.title: Month 1–2: Digital Channel Audit & Verification
timeline.p: We consolidated Ekam Bawa's official artist channels across Spotify, Apple Music, and YouTube. Configured proper remarketing pixels and initiated pre-save campaigns for upcoming tracks like 'Ranjhana' and 'Palkan'.

timeline.title: Month 3–4: Targeted Launch Campaign & Audio Ads
timeline.p: Deployed highly targeted audio ads on Spotify and JioSaavn targeting fans of similar modern Punjabi artists. Utilized dynamic video snippets on YouTube and Instagram Reels to drive high-intent clicks.

timeline.title: Month 5–6: Direct Fan Engagement & Scale
timeline.p: Launched interactive user-generated content (UGC) campaigns on Instagram. Used performance retargeting to serve exclusive BTS (Behind The Scenes) footage to previous listeners, boosting loyal return rates.

results.title: Measurable Performance Growth Metrics
results.description: The metrics below outline the outstanding success achieved during our 6-month marketing campaign.

quote.body: "Adomantra's precise release strategies and targeted programmatic campaigns completely changed how my music connects with fans globally. The streaming numbers are proof of their digital expertise."
quote.author: Ekam Bawa

summaryFooter.title: Strategic Takeaways for Independent Music Creators
items: Unified Artist Footprint: Consolidating all streaming platforms into a verified ecosystem ensures zero leakage of digital traffic.
Intent-Driven Audio Ads: Reaching listeners *while* they are listening to music yields 4x higher CTR than visual banner ads.
UGC as a Growth Multiplier: Encouraging fans to create short-form content drives organic discovery that paid ads can never match.
